# Change-impact map

This map answers: “When I change this, what else must I inspect?” It is a
review frontier, not permission to edit every listed file.

| Change area | Changed paths | Inspect together | Primary checks |
|---|---|---|---|
| Type schema | `vault-template/.memoria/schemas/types/**` | Matching template and folder home<br>Bases and dashboard queries<br>Linter and pre-commit behavior<br>Note-type and frontmatter documentation | `python -m pytest tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_templates.py tests/test_bases.py tests/test_precommit_schema.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Folder home, staging/quarantine root, or skeleton | `vault-template/.memoria/schemas/folders.yaml` | Type schemas and templates<br>Legacy policy and pattern fallback constants<br>Installer scaffold and golden-copy behavior<br>Dashboards and links | `python -m pytest tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_installer_skeleton.py tests/test_policy_mcp.py tests/test_patterns.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Profile capability or path policy | `vault-template/.memoria/tool-registry.yaml`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/lane-overrides/**`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/profiles/**` | Tool registry and matching profile config<br>Lane override and delegation ceiling<br>MCP availability and direct-world prohibitions<br>Profile posture and profile-owned skills | `python -m pytest tests/test_profiles.py tests/test_policy_mcp.py tests/test_policy_hook.py tests/test_tasks_mcp.py tests/test_skill_state_dashboard.py` |
| Runtime policy | `vault-template/.memoria/mcp/policy_mcp.py`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/mcp/policy_server.py`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/mcp/policy_hook.py`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/plugins/memoria-policy-gate/**`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/policy/**` | Lane overrides and legacy gated-prefix fallback<br>Audit contract<br>Mutating Obsidian tool mappings<br>Tasks delegation semantics | `python -m pytest tests/test_policy_mcp.py tests/test_policy_hook.py tests/test_tasks_mcp.py tests/test_schemas.py` |
| Runtime helpers | `src/memoria_vault/runtime/vaultio.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/jsonl.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/time.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/paths.py`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/mcp/_shared.py` | Frontmatter parsing behavior and PyYAML-free fallback<br>JSONL append/iterate tolerance and parent creation<br>UTC timestamp format expected by telemetry/audit rows<br>Runtime modules that still carry duplicate helper code | `python -m pytest tests/test_runtime_helpers.py tests/test_package_spine.py`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_loudness.py tests/test_project_structural_impact.py tests/test_test_env_harness.py` |
| Ingest or linter operation | `vault-template/.memoria/operations/processing/ingest/**`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/operations/integrity/linter/**`<br>`vault-template/.memoria/mcp/ingest_mcp.py` | Calibration and schemas<br>Inbox card contract and shared writers<br>Extract store and source/entity linking<br>Cron wrappers and dashboard fields | `python -m pytest tests/test_pipeline.py tests/test_ingest_mcp.py tests/test_inbox_cards.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Installer | `scripts/install.sh`<br>`scripts/install/**`<br>`scripts/install.ps1` | Installer reference docs<br>Profile deployment and substitutions<br>Disposable-vault behavior<br>PowerShell bridge | `bash -n scripts/install.sh`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_installer_skeleton.py`<br>`bash scripts/e2e-smoke.sh` |
| Bundled Obsidian plugin provenance | `vault-template/.obsidian/community-plugins.json`<br>`vault-template/.obsidian/plugin-provenance-lock.json`<br>`vault-template/.obsidian/plugins/**`<br>`scripts/plugin_provenance_doctor.py` | Enabled plugin roster and bundled plugin directories<br>Lock entry metadata, manifest versions, and SHA-256 artifact digests<br>Undeclared executable artifacts under bundled plugin directories<br>ADR-74 and Obsidian plugin reference wording | `python scripts/plugin_provenance_doctor.py`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_plugin_provenance.py` |
| Offline e2e smoke harness | `scripts/e2e-smoke.sh`<br>`scripts/e2e_smoke.py`<br>`scripts/test_env_harness.py`<br>`tests/fixtures/test-env/**` | Stage names and ordering<br>Disposable-vault assembly assertions<br>Workflow-replay artifacts and deny audit row<br>Shell entrypoint compatibility | `python -m pytest tests/test_e2e_smoke_helpers.py tests/test_test_env_harness.py`<br>`bash scripts/e2e-smoke.sh` |
| Live Hermes L2 smoke | `scripts/test-l2.sh`<br>`scripts/l2_smoke.py` | Hermes profile/config assumptions from upstream docs<br>Disposable vault isolation and temporary HERMES_HOME behavior<br>Deterministic OpenAI-compatible smoke backend<br>Filesystem-backed Obsidian MCP shim tool names<br>Policy-gate plugin deployment and audit assertions | `bash scripts/test-l2.sh --help`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_l2_smoke.py`<br>`bash scripts/test-l2.sh --preflight-only` |
| Testing gate mechanism | `scripts/verify`<br>`scripts/test.sh`<br>`scripts/e2e-smoke.sh`<br>`scripts/test-l2.sh`<br>`.github/workflows/**`<br>`.github/ruleset-contract.yaml`<br>`.agents/playbooks/release.md` | CONTRIBUTING testing and verification guidance<br>Verify-change and release playbooks<br>Release evidence and manual follow-up wording<br>Required-check roster and scripts/verify mode behavior | `python scripts/status_doctor.py`<br>`python scripts/agents_doctor.py` |
| GitHub workflow or PR policy | `.github/workflows/**`<br>`.github/scripts/pr_policy.py` | Required-check invariant and ruleset assumptions<br>Permissions, event trust, and concurrency<br>Safe and sensitive paths<br>Trusted authors | `python scripts/ruleset_doctor.py`<br>`python -m pytest tests/test_pr_policy.py tests/test_ruleset_doctor.py` |
| Documentation or agent guidance | `docs/**`<br>`.agents/**`<br>`AGENTS.md` | Section indexes and guide maps<br>Frontmatter, links, and terminology<br>Referenced commands and repository paths<br>Generated agent references | `python scripts/docs_doctor.py docs`<br>`python scripts/docs_doctor.py --vault-links`<br>`python scripts/status_doctor.py`<br>`python scripts/agents_doctor.py`<br>`npx --yes cspell@8.19.4 lint --no-progress --no-must-find-files --gitignore "**/*.md"` |

## How to use the map

1. Start from the changed row.
2. Inspect each named contract for drift.
3. Edit only consumers that genuinely need to change.
4. Run focused checks from the row.
5. Use [test selection](test-selection.md) to decide whether the full gate is required.
